inputs.businessContext: Second individual measurement value from a dataset for RSD calculation.

inputs.label: Value 3

inputs.label: Value 5

formulas.stdDev: Math.sqrt( ( (value1 - mean) ** 2 + (value2 - mean) ** 2 + (value3 - mean) ** 2 + (value4 - mean) ** 2 + (value5 - mean) ** 2 ) / 4 )
